today.message:
Good morning Niyu!

Hope you slept well. Quick reminder from last night - be ready with that high protein mousse today, I've been thinking about it since I sent you that reel.

Can't wait to try it.

fallbacks.message: Good morning Niyu. However today goes, just know you crossed my mind before I even got out of bed.
Good morning to the person who makes my mornings worth waking up for.
No big update today, Niyu. Just wanted this to be the first thing you see.
Good morning. Have a slow coffee, a good breakfast, and a day that's kind to you.
Good morning Niyu. Sending you all the good energy for whatever today throws at you.
Some mornings don't need a big message. Just - good morning, I'm glad you exist.
Good morning. Wherever you are today, I hope it feels easy.
Good morning Niyu. This is your reminder to drink water, eat something good, and smile at least once because of me.
Good morning. I don't have a story for today, just a very simple fact: I'm lucky.
Good morning Niyu. Hope today treats you as well as you treat everyone around you.
Good morning. Rooting for your day before it's even started.
Good morning Niyu, from someone who's probably already thinking about what to say tomorrow.
Good morning. No news, no plans, just wanted to say your name and smile a little.
Good morning Niyu. May your chai be hot and your day be light.
Good morning. Take today one step at a time, I'm cheering for you from here.
Good morning Niyu. If today gets hard, remember someone's proud of you regardless.
Good morning. Just a small note to start your day with a little warmth.
Good morning Niyu. Hope your morning is calm before the day picks up pace.
Good morning. Sending you patience, good coffee, and a bit of luck for today.
Good morning Niyu. Nothing fancy today, just wanted to be the first good thing in your day.
